name: io.github.askads/mcp-vk-ads
title: VK Ads MCP
description: MCP server for VK Ads (VK Реклама) API: manage ad plans, ad groups, banners, and statistics.

environmentVariables.name: VK_ADS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: VK Ads OAuth2 access token (Bearer) — full account access. Treat it as a secret.

environmentVariables.name: VK_ADS_LANG
environmentVariables.description: Language for API responses (Accept-Language header), e.g. ru, en.

environmentVariables.name: VK_ADS_MAX_RETRIES
environmentVariables.description: Max retries for transient errors (429 rate limit, 5xx on GET, network errors on GET).

environmentVariables.name: VK_ADS_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: API root without a version segment. Defaults to https://ads.vk.com/api.
